name: NeuralFlow
description: AI-powered neural network visualization platform for data scientists
pitch: NeuralFlow provides real-time visualization and debugging tools for deep learning models. Our platform helps data scientists understand complex neural networks, identify bottlenecks, and optimize performance. We're targeting the $50B AI/ML tools market.

name: GreenCharge
description: EV charging infrastructure network for urban areas
pitch: GreenCharge is building the largest urban EV charging network in Southeast Asia. We've already installed 500+ charging stations across 50 cities and have partnerships with major mall operators and property developers.

name: MediSync
description: Healthcare data synchronization platform for clinics
pitch: MediSync connects fragmented healthcare systems, enabling seamless patient data sharing between clinics, labs, and hospitals. Our API integrates with 200+ EMR systems and reduces administrative overhead by 60%.

name: CryptoVault
pitch: CryptoVault offers bank-grade security for institutional crypto holdings. We provide multi-signature cold storage, insurance coverage, and compliance reporting for hedge funds, family offices, and corporates.

name: EduVerse
description: VR-based immersive learning platform for K-12 education
pitch: EduVerse creates virtual reality lessons that make learning interactive and fun. Students can explore ancient Rome, dissect virtual frogs, or walk inside a DNA strand. We're starting with science curriculum for grades 6-12.

name: DataMesh
description: No-code data pipeline builder for mid-market companies
pitch: DataMesh lets non-technical users build complex data pipelines in minutes. Connect your CRM, marketing tools, and databases without writing a single line of code. No more waiting for engineering resources.

name: AgriSmart
description: AI-powered crop monitoring for smallholder farmers
pitch: AgriSmart uses satellite imagery and AI to help smallholder farmers optimize yields. Our mobile app provides personalized recommendations for irrigation, fertilization, and pest control, increasing productivity by 30%.

name: SecureID
description: Decentralized identity verification for remote hiring
pitch: SecureID enables instant, privacy-preserving identity verification for remote hiring. Our blockchain-based solution reduces onboarding time from 5 days to 5 minutes while preventing 99% of identity fraud.

name: LogiBot
description: Warehouse automation robots for e-commerce fulfillment
pitch: LogiBot deploys autonomous robots that can pick, pack, and sort packages in warehouses. Our robots work alongside human workers, increasing throughput by 3x while reducing error rates to near zero.

name: MindfulAI
description: AI mental health companion for corporate employees
pitch: MindfulAI provides 24/7 emotional support through an AI chatbot trained by psychologists. Employees access it via Slack or Teams, getting immediate support for stress, anxiety, and work-related challenges.

name: RetailPulse
pitch: RetailPulse uses computer vision to analyze foot traffic in retail stores. Brick-and-mortar retailers use our analytics to optimize store layouts, staffing, and marketing campaigns based on actual customer behavior.

name: SolarBreeze
description: Solar-powered air conditioning for emerging markets
pitch: SolarBreeze makes affordable, off-grid air conditioning units powered entirely by solar panels. Perfect for homes and small businesses in hot climates without reliable electricity. 70% cheaper than traditional AC units.

name: ChainTrace
pitch: ChainTrace brings transparency to supply chains by tracking products from origin to consumer on blockchain. Consumers scan a QR code to see a product's entire journey, verifying authenticity and ethical sourcing.

name: FinWiz
pitch: FinWiz is like having a personal financial advisor in your pocket. Our AI analyzes spending patterns, suggests optimizations, and creates personalized investment portfolios. Targeting the 80M millennial market in the US.

name: DocuSign AI
pitch: DocuSign AI uses natural language processing to analyze contracts in seconds, identifying risky clauses, suggesting improvements, and even negotiating on your behalf. Lawyers get 10x more productive.

name: BioCure
pitch: BioCure uses machine learning to predict how molecules will behave in the human body, dramatically speeding up drug discovery. Our platform has already helped identify 3 potential treatments for rare diseases.

name: SkillForge
pitch: SkillForge offers short video courses for electricians, plumbers, and HVAC technicians to upskill quickly. Partnered with 50 trade schools and already have 100,000 active learners.

name: UrbanHarvest
description: Vertical farming technology for urban areas
pitch: UrbanHarvest builds modular vertical farms that can be installed on rooftops and parking lots. Our hydroponic systems use 95% less water than traditional farming and produce pesticide-free vegetables year-round.

name: CloudArmor
pitch: CloudArmor automatically finds and fixes security misconfigurations across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Our continuous monitoring prevents data breaches before they happen, saving companies millions in potential damages.

name: FitVerse
description: Gamified fitness metaverse with NFT rewards
pitch: FitVerse combines exercise with gaming and crypto rewards. Users earn NFTs for completing workouts, which can be traded or used to unlock premium features. 500K waitlist signups in just 2 months.

name: SmartKitchen
pitch: SmartKitchen helps restaurants reduce food waste by predicting demand and optimizing inventory. Our AI analyzes weather, events, and historical data to recommend daily orders, reducing waste by 40%.

name: TeleDent
pitch: TeleDent connects rural patients with dentists via video consultations. AI-assisted oral health assessments help identify issues early, and we partner with mobile dental clinics for in-person follow-ups.

name: RentEase
pitch: RentEase automates everything for landlords - from listing units and screening tenants to collecting rent and handling maintenance requests. Currently managing 10,000+ rental units across the US.

name: NanoBots
pitch: NanoBots develops microscopic robots that can deliver drugs directly to diseased cells, minimizing side effects. Our lead candidate is in preclinical trials for treating pancreatic cancer.

name: CareerPath
pitch: CareerPath uses AI to analyze your skills, experience, and goals to create personalized career roadmaps. Includes mock interviews, resume reviews, and salary negotiation coaching. 90% of users land interviews within 60 days.
